body:
- Adds per grid point data structures:
   - [x] `AtmosphericState`
   - [x] `InterpolationCoefficients`
   - [x] `OneStream`/`TwoStream`
   - [x] `SourceFuncLW`
   - [ ] `SourceFuncSW` (not actually tested)

 - Adds `convert` methods to convert between struct of arrays and arrays of structs
 - Adds new tests, which create per grid point data structures, and convert back and forth
 - Adds some methods for per grid point data structures (in cloud optics)
title: Add per grid point structures, and convert methods
